title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates:
Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates!
